description: carsales.com.au is an Australian automotive marketplace for buying, selling, and researching vehicles. Its business integrations include lead delivery into the carsales/Autogate platform for approved third parties.
summary: carsales.com.au exposes documented REST Lead Service APIs for Autogate lead submission (v2 and v3), authenticated with a carsales-issued Basic-auth account; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
